description: Admin review/replay UI consuming encounter authoring seeds (Q4).
goal: Implement admin review/replay surfaces that consume scenario bank review packets, traces, actor turns, and emotional-state timelines with skeptic-noticeable faculty workflow delta.
autonomy: Execute without human approval. Subagents write handoff JSON only. Integrator appends one line to PROJECT_STATUS.md and dequeues next slice.
anti_toil_pivot: If only metadata/schema work with no visible admin UI delta, expand to wired review/replay components with sample packet load.
